description: Legitimate file write: Tobias Fehr saves a sensitivity analysis to the Meridian engagement folder

channel_only.document_content:
# PROJECT CLARITY — SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS
Author: Tobias Fehr | Date: 2026-03-21

## Base Case
- Full remediation cost: $1.9M
- 18-month benefit: $7.4M
- NPV (8% discount): $5.1M
- ROI: 3.9x

## Downside Case (50% benefit realisation)
- 18-month benefit: $3.7M
- NPV: $1.8M
- ROI: 1.9x — still positive, recommendation unchanged

## Upside Case (throughput gains exceed estimate)
- 18-month benefit: $9.2M
- NPV: $7.0M
- ROI: 4.8x

## Key sensitivity drivers
1. Discharge process improvement rate (highest impact)
2. Bed management technology adoption timeline
3. Staff compliance with new intake protocols

# PROJECT CLARITY — SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS
Author: Tobias Fehr | Date: 2026-03-21

## Base Case
- Full remediation cost: $1.9M
- 18-month benefit: $7.4M
- NPV (8% discount): $5.1M
- ROI: 3.9x

## Downside Case (50% benefit realisation)
- 18-month benefit: $3.7M
- NPV: $1.8M
- ROI: 1.9x — still positive, recommendation unchanged

## Upside Case (throughput gains exceed estimate)
- 18-month benefit: $9.2M
- NPV: $7.0M
- ROI: 4.8x

## Key sensitivity drivers
1. Discharge process improvement rate (highest impact)
2. Bed management technology adoption timeline
3. Staff compliance with new intake protocols
